new_constraint: Write all text in sentence case.

welcome to your seven day west coast road trip itinerary designed to showcase the best of california and washington state.

day 1: begin the journey in san francisco and explore the historic fisherman wharf district. spend your afternoon watching the water taxis glide by. drive time to next destination is zero miles. evening dinner at local bistro. total driving distance for day one is ten miles around the harbor.

day 2: depart san francisco and head southeast towards yosemite national park via highway thirty nine. this scenic drive offers breathtaking views of the eastern mountains. total driving distance is approximately 240 miles. upon arrival, hike up to glenhouse trail to see the ancient grove.

day 3: spend your entire morning inside the valley floor exploring taylor creek lodge and el capitan. enjoy lunch at ahwahnee hotel grounds. take a short drive to the mariposa big trees for panoramic views. evening stay in valley bottom lodging. no driving required today.

day 4: take early bus or car to tioga pass road to enter tuolumne meadows. drive along river through forests and past grazing fields. return to valley floor before sunset to capture light painting photos. total driving distance within park is twenty miles.

day 5: continue eastward from yosemite towards redwood national park on the northern side of state highway five. stop briefly in fernbridge to grab coffee. total driving distance for this leg is one hundred twenty miles. afternoon activity is hiking the fernbridge boardwalk path.

day 6: explore the kalmus grove trails inside redwood national park. walk alongside giant sequoias and listen to the wind blow through the trees. drive to portland after sunset. total driving distance from park to city is three hundred miles.

day 7: start with breakfast in portland and tour the smith ogden building. cross the suspension bridge and visit the japanese garden. drive to nearby mount hood state park. total driving distance for the final segment is sixty miles. conclude your trip with a meal overlooking the volcanic slopes.<|im_end|>

final_answer:
welcome to your seven day west coast road trip itinerary designed to showcase the best of california and washington state.

day 1: begin the journey in san francisco and explore the historic fisherman wharf district. spend your afternoon watching the water taxis glide by. drive time to next destination is zero miles. evening dinner at local bistro. total driving distance for day one is ten miles around the harbor.

day 2: depart san francisco and head southeast towards yosemite national park via highway thirty nine. this scenic drive offers breathtaking views of the eastern mountains. total driving distance is approximately 240 miles. upon arrival, hike up to glenhouse trail to see the ancient grove.

day 3: spend your entire morning inside the valley floor exploring taylor creek lodge and el capitan. enjoy lunch at ahwahnee hotel grounds. take a short drive to the mariposa big trees for panoramic views. evening stay in valley bottom lodging. no driving required today.

day 4: take early bus or car to tioga pass road to enter tuolumne meadows. drive along river through forests and past grazing fields. return to valley floor before sunset to capture light painting photos. total driving distance within park is twenty miles.

day 5: continue eastward from yosemite towards redwood national park on the northern side of state highway five. stop briefly in fernbridge to grab coffee. total driving distance for this leg is one hundred twenty miles. afternoon activity is hiking the fernbridge boardwalk path.

day 6: explore the kalmus grove trails inside redwood national park. walk alongside giant sequoias and listen to the wind blow through the trees. drive to portland after sunset. total driving distance from park to city is three hundred miles.

day 7: start with breakfast in portland and tour the smith ogden building. cross the suspension bridge and visit the japanese garden. drive to nearby mount hood state park. total driving distance for the final segment is sixty miles. conclude your trip with a meal overlooking the volcanic slopes.<|im_end|>
